title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MABABANG PAARALAN NG OBISPO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MABABANG PAARALANG GREGORIO AGONCILLO

chunks.text:
H. No. 20637 / 85 OG No. 51, 69 Supp (Dec. 18, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6798, December 12, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MABABANG PAARALAN NG OBISPO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MABABANG PAARALANG GREGORIO AGONCILLO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Mababang Paaralan ng Obispo in the Municipality of Tuy, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Mababang Paaralang Gregorio Agoncillo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 24, 1989 and September 22, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: December 12, 1989

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
